config.name: generic_access_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: generic_access_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: HTTP Activity (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:19:13.930122

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local IP_PATTERN = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$"
local HTTP_METHODS = {
    GET = true, POST = true, PUT = true, DELETE = true,
    HEAD = true, OPTIONS = true, PATCH = true
}

-- Cache frequently used functions
local tonumber = tonumber
local type = type
local format = string.format
local match = string.match

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with local table
    local output = {
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "HTTP Activity", 
        category_uid = 1,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 100101,
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                name = "Generic Web Server",
                vendor_name = "Generic"
            }
        },
        http = {},
        src_endpoint = {}
    }

    -- Efficient IP validation and transformation
    if record.ip then
        local ip = record.ip
        if match(ip, IP_PATTERN) then
            output.src_endpoint.ip = ip
        end
    end

    -- HTTP method validation and transformation
    if record.method then
        local method = record.method:upper()
        if HTTP_METHODS[method] then
            output.http.method = method
        end
    end

    -- Efficient URI parsing with validation
    if record.uri then
        local uri = record.uri
        -- Basic URI sanitation
        uri = uri:gsub("[^%w%p ]", "")
        output.http.url = uri
    end

    -- Status code transformation with type casting
    if record.status then
        local status = tonumber(record.status)
        if status and status >= 100 and status < 600 then
            output.http.status_code = status
        end
    end

    -- Bytes transferred transformation
    if record.bytes then
        local bytes = tonumber(record.bytes)
        if bytes and bytes >= 0 then
            output.http.bytes = bytes
        end
    end

    -- Timestamp handling
    if record.timestamp then
        -- Assuming timestamp is in standard format
        local ts = tonumber(record.timestamp)
        if ts then
            output.time = ts * 1000 -- Convert to milliseconds
        end
    else
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    -- User agent transformation
    if record.agent then
        output.http.user_agent = record.agent
    end

    -- Referrer transformation
    if record.referrer and record.referrer ~= "-" then
        output.http.referrer = record.referrer
    end

    -- Final validation of required OCSF fields
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handling wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
